title: AVERT Receipt
description: Tamper-evident proof produced by the AVERT Receipt step on a successful Execute. The Apier reference implementation signs receipts with HMAC-SHA256-v1 and persists them to an append-only store; until the live write path ships, `government_response_raw` is mock-generated (see IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md).

action.description: The government action this receipt attests to.

submitted_payload_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the submitted payload, binding the receipt to exactly what was sent.

government_response_raw.description: The raw response returned by the government system. Mock-generated in the reference implementation until the live write path ships.

signature_algorithm.description: Algorithm used to sign the receipt. Versioned so the signing scheme can evolve without ambiguity.

signature.description: Signature over the receipt's signed content. Any change to that content invalidates this signature.

audit_log_id.description: Reference linking this receipt to its entry in the AVERT Trail.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the receipt was minted.
